nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated bush sparrow
nodes.summary: Yellow-throated bush sparrow（Yellow-throated bush sparrow，学名 Gymnoris superciliaris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于森林，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in south-central and southern Africa in its natural habitats of subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in south-central and southern Africa in its natural habitats of subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in south-central and southern Africa in its natural habitats of subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland
